title: Add /support page, replace 'learn more' with 'support' button
Accept repository_dispatch from iOS repo for shared updates
Reconnect resume issue
body: session now restores automatically after short drops

title: fixed reconnect issue during session resume
body: if your connection dropped mid-conversation, the app would sometimes fail to reconnect silently. this is now fixed — reconnect happens automatically within 3 seconds, and the session resumes cleanly.

title: added /dashboard command and credit display
body: type /dashboard to open your personal control panel. shows your current credit balance, rank, session stats, and quick access to themes and settings — all in the same terminal interface.

title: improved command picker behavior after selection
body: after selecting a command from the picker, the input field now clears instantly and focus returns to the text area. no more extra tap needed — just pick a command and keep going.
